original_text: Profitability metrics show dramatic expansion from FY2022 baseline levels. FY2025 gross profit reached $360,510,000,000 [CHUNK_ID: acb368e0-60f2-4431-9044-b8d2820f4da9], operating income climbed to $79,975,000,000 [CHUNK_ID: 98d37e7b-d9b8-4798-8d78-32c8508a1ff4], and net income achieved $77,670,000,000 [CHUNK_ID: 702aed43-27c7-4250-b493-cced0fb3ad06]. This represents substantial improvement from FY2022, where gross margin stood at 43.81% [CALC_ID: edade71e-0bfb-4746-a37b-e3e09c550cd3], operating margin at 2.38% [CALC_ID: c0a44539-99d5-4b5d-b6e9-551d675efa31], and net margin at -0.53% [CALC_ID: 8a641992-c5cf-4f11-90ac-1eca33419a4c]. The margin expansion trajectory indicates successful cost optimization initiatives and a favorable shift toward higher-margin businesses including AWS and advertising.
revised_text: Profitability metrics show dramatic expansion from FY2022 baseline levels. FY2025 gross profit is projected to reach $360,510,000,000 [CHUNK_ID: 4a8ce233-eda6-4a1f-abcb-9e2306c3e8dc], operating income to climb to $79,975,000,000 [CHUNK_ID: 4a8ce233-eda6-4a1f-abcb-9e2306c3e8dc], and net income to achieve $77,670,000,000 [CHUNK_ID: 4a8ce233-eda6-4a1f-abcb-9e2306c3e8dc]. This represents substantial improvement from FY2022 [CHUNK_ID: bc591e33-ea87-4e39-a4cb-9ca56789b93e], where gross margin stood at 43.81% [CALC_ID: edade71e-0bfb-4746-a37b-e3e09c550cd3], operating margin at 2.38% [CALC_ID: c0a44539-99d5-4b5d-b6e9-551d675efa31], and net margin at -0.53% [CALC_ID: 8a641992-c5cf-4f11-90ac-1eca33419a4c]. The margin expansion trajectory indicates successful cost optimization initiatives and a favorable shift toward higher-margin businesses including AWS and advertising.
changes_summary: Fixed three issues: (1) Changed FY2025 language from 'reached/climbed to/achieved' (actuals) to 'is projected to reach/climb to/achieve' (projections) to address scope violation since FY2025 is not complete as of July 2025; (2) Replaced chunks acb368e0, 98d37e7b, 702aed43 with chunk 4a8ce233 which explicitly shows Date: 2025-12-31, properly supporting FY2025 attribution; (3) Added chunk bc591e33 (FY2022 income statement with Date: 2022-12-31) to support the FY2022 margin claims, as the calculation IDs alone do not specify the fiscal year.
